vals.description: ServiceNow cloud-based platform and solutions deliver digital workflows to unlock productivity for employees and enterprises. The AI Research Group conducts fundamental and applied research to futureproof AI-powered experiences for users of the Now Platform®. We make workflows smarter, AI workloads more efficient, and are committed to making socially responsible contributions to the AI community.
vals.name: ServiceNow

vals.description: A global investment and technology development firm
vals.name: D. E. Shaw Group

vals.description: At Amazon, we believe that scientific innovation is essential to being the most customer-centric company in the world. Our scientists' ability to have an impact at scale allows us to attract some of the brightest minds in artificial intelligence and related fields.
vals.name: Amazon

vals.description: About Citadel and Citadel Securities Citadel is a multi-strategy alternative investment manager. For more than three decades, we've captured undiscovered market opportunities by empowering extraordinary people to pursue their best and boldest ideas. Each day at Citadel, we reimagine and refine our strategies, models and technology in pursuit of superior long-term performance. Citadel Securities is the next-generation capital markets firm. We create efficient ways for buyers and sellers to come together; we innovative ways to price and absorb risk; and we develop new technologies to transform markets. Integrating deep financial, mathematical and engineering expertise, Citadel Securities delivers critical liquidity to central banks, financial institutions, government agencies, corporations, insurers and sovereign wealth funds.
vals.name: Citadel

vals.description: Turing is a technology company pioneering artificial general intelligence (AGI) space. Our mission is to accelerate AGI advancement and deployment by leveraging human intelligence and AI to improve each other. We focus on AI-powered sourcing, vetting, matching, and operations of top talent to build products, removing the human intelligence bottleneck in AGI adoption and deployment. Our comprehensive platform supports enterprises needing custom engineering, LLM training, or AI/AGI deployment.
vals.name: Turing

vals.description: Google Research is committed to advancing the state-of-the-art in computer science and making discoveries that enable better technologies that improve people's lives.
vals.name: Google Research

vals.description: Our mission is to empower businesses with high quality data to develop safe, responsible and trustworthy AI products
vals.name: Toloka AI

vals.description: Founded in 2012, ByteDance's mission is to inspire creativity and enrich life. With a suite of more than a dozen products, including TikTok, CapCut, Lark, and Pico, as well as platforms specific to the China market, including Toutiao, Douyin, Fanqie Novel and Xigua Video, ByteDance has made it easier and more fun for people to connect with, consume, and create content.
vals.name: ByteDance

vals.description: Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Block, Comcast, Condé Nast, Rivian, Shell and over 60% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to take control of their data and put it to work with AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe, and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake, MLflow, and Unity Catalog.
vals.name: Databricks

vals.description: Kensho is S&P Global's hub for AI innovation and transformation. With expertise in machine learning, natural language processing, and data discovery, we develop and deploy novel solutions to innovate and drive progress at S&P Global and its customers worldwide. Kensho's solutions and research focus on business and financial generative AI applications, agents, data retrieval APIs, data extraction, and much more.
vals.name: Kensho

vals.description: Jane Street is a quantitative trading firm that trades on more than 200 venues in 45 countries. Our machine learning team works on the neural network models driving our trading strategies, and builds the infrastructure that make training and inference possible. We're looking for smart and curious individuals from industry and academia to shape the future of ML at Jane Street.
vals.name: Jane Street

vals.description: Cubist Systematic Strategies, an affiliate of Point72, deploys systematic, computer-driven trading strategies across multiple liquid asset classes, including equities, futures and foreign exchange. The core of our effort is rigorous research into a wide range of market anomalies, fueled by our unparalleled access to a wide range of publicly available data sources.
vals.name: Cubist Systematic

vals.description: Handshake AI is building the next generation of AI-powered career platform to help students and recent graduates find meaningful career opportunities.
vals.name: Handshake AI

vals.description: Freestone Grove is a technology company.
vals.name: Freestone Grove

vals.description: Collinear is an early-stage, VC-backed startup helping enterprise customers build safe, reliable, and high-performing AI systems. Our AI judge framework uses smaller, specialized reward models to evaluate LLM outputs for accuracy, safety, and alignment, turning real-world failure modes into high-quality post-training data. We combine rigorous post-training and alignment research with hands-on engineering to deliver automated evaluation, adversarial red teaming, and targeted model improvement, enabling enterprises to deploy AI they can trust.
vals.name: Collinear AI

vals.description: Microsoft is a global technology company known for its software, services, devices, and solutions that help people and businesses realize their full potential.
vals.name: Microsoft

vals.description: Two Sigma is a systematic investment manager founded with the belief that innovative technology and rigorous scientific method can be applied to investment management to deliver superior returns.
vals.name: Two Sigma

vals.description: Translated is a leading provider of translation and localization services, combining human expertise with AI technology to deliver high-quality translations for businesses worldwide.
vals.name: Translated
